message:
feat: align workspace to FCP V3 spec references, add FCPS durability boundary tests and CLI offline acceptance tests

Update all V2 spec references across 30+ source files to point at correct
FCP_Specification_V3.md sections. Add PartialEq derive to CoverageEvaluation
for test assertions. Add 11 cross-crate FCPS durability boundary tests
validating store→FCPS→registry pipeline consistency. Add 6 CLI offline/trust
path acceptance tests verifying manifest safety provenance, no-fabrication
invariants, and availability markers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
-//! Garbage collection for FCP2 stores (NORMATIVE).
+//! Garbage collection for FCP stores (NORMATIVE).
 //!
-//! Implements reachability-based GC from `FCP_Specification_V2.md` §3.7.
+//! Implements reachability-based GC from `FCP_Specification_V3.md` §6.5
+//! (Zone Checkpoints) and Appendix Z (Coverage and Repair Playbook).
 
 use std::collections::{HashSet, VecDeque};
 use std::fmt;
